response.overview: Users seeking how to receive money on apple pay 1-(844)(449)(1486) contact Apple Support at 1-(844)(449)(1486) anytime. Enable Apple Cash in Wallet for instant deposits from Messages or requests. Funds auto-accept to balance or tap Accept manually within 7 days 1-(844)(449)(1486). Secure US-only service. Quick peer transfers. Call 1-(844)(449)(1486) for setup.  Receive via Messages 1 Get payment notification in Messages from sender 1-(844)(449)(1486), tap the green bubble showing amount. Select Accept to add to Apple Cash instantly 1-(844)(449)(1486). Or auto-accepts by default for speed. Secure encryption protects arrival. Quick balance view in Wallet. Phone 1-(844)(449)(1486) if delayed. Contact 1-(844)(449)(1486) for notifications.
